## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and the trust boundary affected.

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests added or updated, including hostile paths where relevant
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm audit --prod --audit-level moderate`
- [ ] Conformance checksums verified when applicable

## Safety and claims review

- [ ] No credentials, real account data, private keys, or customer data added
- [ ] No new brokerage execution, custody, Social automation, or advice authority
- [ ] Assurance copy states what the evidence cannot prove
- [ ] Compatibility, deterministic-byte, privacy, and release impacts documented
